GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council

  • Tweet

The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part.

Harrow Residents' Survey

  • Current Survey
  • In order to keep this survey representative:
  • Your details
Are you aware of the improvements the new Conservative-run Harrow Council is making?
Which of these local matters would you consider to be of most importance to you? (Tick all that apply)
Which of the Government's five pledges are most important to you?
Are you in favour of the Mayor of London's ULEZ expansion to the whole of London (including Harrow)?
If you live in Harrow East, how well do you think Bob Blackman is doing as your MP?

Bob Blackman MP Your Local Voice for Harrow East
